_comment: Copy this into the repository-root config.test.json (already gitignored). The harness reads config.test.json from the repo root. Authentication: set live.username + live.password (with clientId + clientSecret) and the harness logs in headlessly via the OAuth2 password grant — no browser needed; the obtained token is cached in live.token. Alternatively run `npm test -- --instance demo --port 8080` once for the browser flow. live.otp is an optional one-time 2FA code.
